languages.text: Огромные ковши экскаваторов снимают верхние слои почвы, обнажая залежи песков. Для их добычи в огромные карьеры превращают целые регионы.

traits.locale_text: Огромные ковши экскаваторов снимают верхние слои почвы, обнажая залежи песков. Для их добычи в огромные карьеры превращают целые регионы.
Огромные ковши экскаваторов снимают верхние слои почвы, обнажая залежи песков. Для их добычи в огромные карьеры превращают целые регионы.

languages.text: Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.
languages.original_text: Огромные ковши экскаваторов снимают верхние слои почвы, обнажая залежи песков. Для их добычи в огромные карьеры превращают целые регионы.

traits.locale_text: Giant excavator dippers lift the upper layers of soil, baring the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.
Giant excavator dippers lift the upper layers of soil, baring the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.
Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.
Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.
Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.
Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.

languages.text: Riesige Baggerschaufeln tragen die oberen Bodenschichten ab und legen die Sandvorkommen frei. Ganze Regionen werden in riesige Tagebaue verwandelt.
languages.original_text: Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.

traits.locale_text: Riesige Baggerschaufeln tragen die oberen Bodenschichten ab und legen die Sandvorkommen frei. Ganze Regionen werden in riesige Tagebaue verwandelt.

languages.text: Des excavateurs géants enlèvent les couches supérieures du sol, mettant à nu les dépôts de sable. Des régions entières sont transformées en mines à ciel ouvert géantes.
languages.original_text: Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.

traits.locale_text: Des excavateurs géants enlèvent les couches supérieures du sol, mettant à nu les dépôts de sable. Des régions entières sont transformées en mines à ciel ouvert géantes.

languages.text: Gigantescas palas excavadoras retiran las capas superiores del suelo, dejando al descubierto los depósitos de arena. Regiones enteras se convierten en gigantescas minas a cielo abierto.
languages.original_text: Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.

traits.locale_text: Gigantescas palas excavadoras retiran las capas superiores del suelo, dejando al descubierto los depósitos de arena. Regiones enteras se convierten en gigantescas minas a cielo abierto.

languages.text: Dev ekskavatör kepçeleri toprağın üst katmanlarını kaldırarak kum yataklarını ortaya çıkarıyor. Tüm bölgeler dev şerit madenlerine dönüştürülüyor.
languages.original_text: Giant excavator scoops remove the upper layers of soil, exposing the sand deposits. Whole regions are turned into giant strip mines.

traits.locale_text: Dev ekskavatör kepçeleri toprağın üst katmanlarını kaldırarak kum yataklarını ortaya çıkarıyor. Tüm bölgeler dev şerit madenlerine dönüştürülüyor.
